title: Developmental and stem cell biology's bright future.
author_string: Lewis, Jennifer, Schuh, Melina, Hanna, Jacob H, Zernicka-Goetz, Magdalena, Srivastava, Mansi et al.
abstract: The next 50 years of developmental biology will illuminate exciting new discoveries but are also poised to provide solutions to important problems society faces. Ten scientists whose work intersects with developmental biology in various capacities tell us about their vision for the future.
